name: Housing Works Cannabis Co
notes: NY State's first adult-use dispensary (opened Dec 2022). Nonprofit — all proceeds support Housing Works mission. NYS adult-use regulations prohibit loyalty programs; none confirmed.

name: Smacked Village
notes: Address in dispensaries.mjs (99 MacDougal St) is stale — confirmed address is 144 Bleecker St. First Black-owned licensed dispensary in NYC. Loyalty program at getsmacked.online/loyalty/.

name: The Travel Agency
notes: Address in dispensaries.mjs (33 Christopher St) does not match any known Travel Agency location — no West Village/Christopher St location appears on their official site. Current NYC locations: Union Square (835 Broadway, 646-777-7420), SoHo (598 Broadway, 212-830-7420), Fifth Ave Midtown (587 5th Ave, 212-420-6000), Downtown Brooklyn (122 Flatbush Ave, 718-400-1420). Menu URL in scraper (thetravelagency.co/flower/) is a valid generic flower page. Travel Club rewards program confirmed.

name: Dazed
address: 33 Union Square W, New York, NY 10003
notes: Address in dispensaries.mjs (287 Hudson St) is wrong — confirmed location is 33 Union Square W, inside the historic Decker Building (former Andy Warhol studio). VIP loyalty program confirmed.

name: The Alchemy (Flatiron)
notes: Address in dispensaries.mjs (22 W 23rd St) is wrong — confirmed address is 12 W 18th St. In-store pickup only (no delivery from this location). Loyalty/membership program confirmed on official site.

name: The Alchemy (Chelsea)
notes: Address in dispensaries.mjs (254 W 29th St) is wrong — confirmed address is 302 8th Ave. Free delivery available from this location. Shared Instagram and website with Flatiron location.

name: Stoops NYC
notes: Address confirmed. Loyalty/rewards program confirmed — earn points, exclusive discounts, and event access.

name: Blue Forest Farms
notes: Address in dispensaries.mjs (55 W 17th St) is wrong — confirmed address is 122 E 25th St. Loyalty program confirmed per customer reviews.

name: Mighty Lucky
notes: Address in dispensaries.mjs (234 W 14th St) is wrong — confirmed address is 259 Bowery. Loyalty/rewards program with exclusive perks and early access to drops confirmed.

name: Gotham (Bowery)
notes: Address confirmed. Refer-a-friend loyalty program confirmed (400 points = $20 value per referred friend). Two-story flagship with art gallery.

name: Gotham (Chelsea)
notes: Address confirmed. Newer Chelsea location opened 2025. Shared website and Instagram with Bowery location.

name: New Amsterdam
notes: Address confirmed. Robust tiered loyalty program: earn 1 pt per dollar (up to 2.5x multipliers), tiered $5/$10/$15 discounts, birthday bonuses, referral bonuses.

name: CONBUD
notes: Address in dispensaries.mjs (100 Delancey St) is wrong — confirmed address is 85 Delancey St. Hires formerly incarcerated individuals. 'Bud Club' loyalty program confirmed.

name: Green Genius
notes: Address in dispensaries.mjs (131 W 28th St) is wrong — confirmed address is 214 3rd Ave (Gramercy). Loyalty rewards program confirmed.

name: VERDI
notes: Address in dispensaries.mjs (205 W 28th St) is wrong AND the Weedmaps listing noted as removed was likely stale data — VERDI is open and confirmed at 158 W 23rd St. 100% family-owned. No loyalty program confirmed or denied.

name: KushKlub NYC
notes: Address in dispensaries.mjs (119 W 25th St) is wrong — confirmed address is 186 Orchard St (LES). App-based loyalty program (earn points per purchase, redeem for savings). menu.kushklub.com used as menu URL.

name: Smiley Exotics
notes: Address in dispensaries.mjs (218 W 23rd St) is wrong — confirmed address is 201 E 30th St (Kips Bay/Murray Hill). Loyalty rewards program confirmed.
